T0365.title: Winner's Service Fee
T0365.definition: 在赌博黑产中，“窑花”指从赢家手里强行抽走的各类名目费用，实为赌场变相抽头。
T0365.description: This money is typically collected under the guise of transportation, water, cigarette, or labor fees, deducted directly from the winner's payout to ensure the house profits regardless of the game's outcome. The percentage is often pre-agreed but can be increased arbitrarily, making it a covert method to squeeze gamblers' profits. In mobile gambling operations, this fee also covers costs like transportation and lookouts, sustaining the entire illicit ecosystem.
